title: Senior Teacher - Lido Learning International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Lido Learning International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lido Learning International Enterprises family as a Senior Teacher in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lido Learning International Enterprises:
Lido Learning International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
